classifier_reason: Wintermute Ventures is the strategic investment arm of Wintermute, and the official Wintermute site markets OTC liquidity, algorithmic trading, liquidity provision, DeFi, and Ventures as connected business lines, so this row requires full capability search rather than light VC-only review.

Jump Crypto is the investment arm of Jump Trading, but official Jump Trading and Jump Crypto pages present a trading-and-building operator with quantitative trading roots, active crypto market participation, DeFi infrastructure work, and explicit parent-child branding, so this row requires full capability search with parent context made explicit.
